title: Reduce header vertical spacing and compact layout

requirements.text: Reduce the vertical padding and spacing around all header elements in the Header component to create a more compact top section
acceptanceCriteria: The overall height of the header section is visibly reduced
Padding around header elements is decreased while maintaining visual balance
All header elements remain properly aligned and readable

requirements.text: Decrease the vertical spacing between the logo, BrandingBannerDropdown menu, and login button that are stacked in the top left area
acceptanceCriteria: The gap between the logo and dropdown menu is reduced
The gap between the dropdown menu and login button is reduced
Elements remain easily clickable with sufficient touch targets

requirements.text: Move the slogan text closer to the header content to reduce the overall header height and create a more compact top section

quotes: Moved closer to reduce overall header height

acceptanceCriteria: The slogan text is positioned closer to the header elements above it
The overall vertical space consumed by the top section is noticeably reduced
The slogan remains readable and properly styled

constraints: Maintain touch-friendly click targets for all interactive elements
Preserve existing header functionality and navigation structure
Keep the logo size unchanged as per previous requirements
nonGoals: Changing the size of the speaker logo
Rearranging the layout structure of header elements
